subject: CLA Persistent Reminders v1.1 LIVE; governance/ namespace + sync whitelist established; §15 URL block convention enforced for all future task prompts
body: Authored governance/UZG_PLUS_LANE1_CLA_PERSISTENT_REMINDERS_v1_1.md (425 lines, 16 sections) per V2 task §4 verbatim embed. Established 3 things at once: (1) governance/ namespace in repo (folder didn't exist before), (2) sync_runtime_to_public.yml whitelist for governance/** + copy step (pattern from canon/** fix in PR #29), (3) §15 LIVE MIRROR URL BLOCK convention (8 sub-rules — mandatory format for Dev1/Dev2 status responses). Single PR #36 squash-merged at 555e8c1; manual sync dispatch run 25152593343 success; Reminders URL HTTP 200 OK on Live mirror. Supersedes V1 (HALTED — v1.0 baseline not in workspace; resolved by NTS embedding full v1.1 content in V2 task §4). AC-01..12 ALL PASS. Effective immediately: this very status response demonstrates §15 URL block convention.
requested_action: 1. CLA Lane_01 verify §15 rule applied to all future task prompts (add line in §16 Sign-off expectations: 'Status response MUST end with 📎 LIVE MIRROR URLS block per CLA Persistent Reminders §15'). 2. Continue Module Canon Tier 4 authoring in chat per Phase 2 Mockup Priority Brief §7 critical-path: ENTA Module first (unblocks P1 Public ENTA + P8 Onboarding), PLUS Hub Module second (unblocks P5 Governance + P6 AIER + P7 Marketplace). 3. Verify next Dev1/Dev2 status response includes URL block per §15.
acceptance_criteria: AC-01..AC-08 all PASS at PR-create time (file created + 16 sections + §15 8 sub-rules + changelog + governance/ folder + sync whitelist + DOT deliverables + handoff schema-conformant)
